name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Income support of Rs. 6,000 per year for landholding farmer families.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Financial assistance for construction or purchase of a house for BPL and low-income families.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Small savings scheme for the welfare of a girl child in the family.

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension support for persons with disabilities from BPL households.

name: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor Scheme)
description: Collateral-free working capital loans for street vendors.

name: PM Vishwakarma Yojana
description: Support scheme for traditional artisans and craftspeople, including training and low-interest loans.

name: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Rural Livelihoods Mission (Woman SHG)
description: Support for women's Self Help Groups (SHGs) to build sustainable livelihoods in rural areas.

name: Ayushman Bharat - PM Jan Arogya Yojana (PMJAY)
description: Health insurance cover of Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for BPL and low-income families.

name: National Scholarship Portal - Post Matric Scholarship
description: Scholarship support for students from economically weaker sections to continue education.

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households.

name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
description: Monthly pension for widows from BPL households.

name: State General Welfare Assistance
description: General welfare and financial assistance for citizens who do not match a specific scheme category. Please visit your nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) for a detailed manual eligibility check.
